## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming product changes.](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SchoolAI is launching a completely rebuilt product experience in June, featuring more SEO-friendly space pages and a new user interface](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Site traffic is recovering after a recent drop, with overall clicks up by 5,700 and impressions up by 24K](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [SchoolAI plans to transition away from Framer to a more robust CMS, likely after September](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [A new strategy for indexing and no-indexing spaces will be implemented to balance SEO benefits and content quality control](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Recovery in site clicks and impressions after previous week's drop](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Overall site up by 5,700 clicks and 24K impressions](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [GrowthX content performance: clicks down, impressions up by 1,700+](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Top performing page: "AI homework helper tools" with 300+ clicks over other pages](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### New Product Experience Launch

  - [Complete rebuild of SchoolAI product, launching in June](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [New space pages with more content, learning outcomes, standards, and agendas](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Redesigned user interface with "Dot" AI assistant and power-up stage](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Improved SEO potential with more indexable content on space pages](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)

### Indexing Strategy for Spaces

  - [Product team to build a manifest for controlling space indexing](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Nikki to provide CSV of spaces to preserve for indexing](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [High-performing spaces to remain indexed; others to be no-indexed](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Future automated system based on launch frequency and quality score](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [WWW pages to be 301 redirected to corresponding app.schoolai.com space pages](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

### Website Platform Transition

  - [Plans to move away from Framer after September due to limitations](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Considering hiring a developer to start building a new website](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Exploring CMS options like Webflow and Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Need to preserve SEO work during the transition](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

### SEO Considerations for New Product

  - [Canonical tags to be used for remixed spaces to avoid duplicate content issues](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [No-index and canonical strategy for remixed spaces to consolidate SEO value](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [Content for indexed spaces to be AI-generated based on teacher inputs and Dot's prompting](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to provide a list of spaces with meaningful traffic to keep indexing](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [Nikki to add high-performing spaces to the product team's whitelist for indexing](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Implement no-index for non-priority spaces on app.schoolai.com](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [301 redirect www pages to corresponding app.schoolai.com space pages](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Nikki to inform Colton about potential Strapi connection through GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and optimizing new space pages for SEO as they launch](https://fathom.video/share/AoG5Gskj65r9MLWQLm8TTDRvPsKXkVfF?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
